• Shelving
  • util
  • db
  • Providers
  • Cache
  • CollectionCache
  • DBCache
  • Migrations
  • Collection
  • Stores
  • bun
  • extract
  • react
  • ui
  • error
  • api
  • cloudflare
  • markup
  • test
  • schema
  • sequence
  • firestore
  • store

    • Cache of CollectionCache objects for multiple collections.

    • Use get(collection) to retrieve or create the CollectionCache for a given collection,
      then getItem(id) / getQuery(query) on that to get a specific store.
    Go

    provider

    DBProvider<I, T>
    Go

    memory

    MemoryDBProvider<I, T> | undefined
    Go

    get

    (collection: Collection<string, II, TT>) => CollectionCache<II, TT>
    (collection: Collection<string, I, T>) => CollectionCache<I, T>

    Get (or create) the CollectionCache for the given collection.

    Go

    getItem

    (collection: Collection<string, II, TT>, id: II) => ItemStore<II, TT>

    Get (or create) an ItemStore for a collection/id in one hop.

    Go

    getQuery

    (collection: Collection<string, II, TT>, query: Query<Item<II, TT>>) => QueryStore<II, TT>

    Get (or create) a QueryStore for a collection/query in one hop.

    Go

    refreshItem

    (collection: Collection<string, II, TT>, id: II, maxAge?: number) => Promise<void>

    Refresh a specific item store for a collection.

    Go

    refreshItems

    (collection: Collection<string, II, TT>, maxAge?: number) => Promise<void>

    Refresh every cached item store for a collection.

    Go

    refreshQuery

    (collection: Collection<string, II, TT>, query: Query<Item<II, TT>>, maxAge?: number) => Promise<void>

    Refresh a specific query store for a collection.

    Go

    refreshQueries

    (collection: Collection<string, II, TT>, maxAge?: number) => Promise<void>

    Refresh every cached query store for a collection.

    Go

    refreshAll

    (collection: Collection<string, II, TT>, maxAge?: number) => Promise<void>

    Refresh every cached store (items and queries) for a collection.
